title: Avoid Using Loops to Copy Arrays and Lists
description: This rule warns if arrays or lists are copied using loops. It is more efficient and clear to use built-in methods provided by JDK to copy contents from one array to another. This rule only detects idiomatic patterns and will not consider loops with non-trivial control flow.
recommendation: Replace loops used for copying arrays or lists with built-in methods provided by JDK.
impact: Improves code readability and performance by replacing verbose loop usage with built-in array copy methods.

checks.message: Avoid using loops to copy arrays or lists. Use built-in copy methods.
